summary: Implemented phase-02 only: expanded closure-claim guard coverage to checklist/acceptance docs via registry globs, hardened validate_stack_conformance to resolve glob targets fail-closed, and added targeted disprover tests for checklist overclaim and missing glob coverage. Governed route used: continue/module worker path.
remaining_risks: Forbidden-term detection is literal substring matching; negated phrasing that still contains a forbidden token will fail closed by design.
